SongRequest.title: SongRequest
SongRequest.description: Represents a single song request submitted by a singer in the karaoke system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SongRequest entity.

singerName.description: The name provided by the singer for their request.

songTitle.description: The title of the song requested by the singer.

artistName.description: The name of the artist for the requested song.

notes.description: Optional additional notes or special requests from the singer.

keyAdjustment.description: Optional key adjustment for the song.

tempoAdjustment.description: Optional tempo adjustment for the song.

contactNumber.description: The singer's phone number, if provided.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the song request was submitted.

status.description: The current processing status of the song request.

HostConfiguration.title: HostConfiguration
HostConfiguration.description: Stores global configuration settings managed by the host.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HostConfiguration entity.

submissionsOpen.description: A boolean flag indicating whether the system is currently accepting new song requests.

logoUrl.description: URL for the host's branding logo.

definition.description: Collection of all submitted song requests.
